html:
Exclusive to:  

The Eyebrella is a Dress Item that equips to the head slot. It requires 1 Deerclops Eyeball, 15 Twigs, and 4 Bone Shards to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 55.5% of its durability. 

It provides 240 points of Summer insulation and absolute protection from Rain and Lightning. 

The Eyebrella is considered to be an incredibly valuable dress item for both Spring and Summer, having the highest protective stats in game for the effects of both seasons. With careful use, the Eyebrella can be kept in good condition throughout Spring with only a single use of a Sewing Kit.

The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the Rain Coat to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent Rain of Spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free.

The Eyebrella also turns all Electric Damage into Physical Damage and ignore Shock effect.


Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Victorian Eyebrella skin was introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
  • The Loyal Glass Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from January 23, 2020 to March 19, 2020, and from January 28, 2021 to February 4, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Rosy Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 27, 2024 to Jule 25, 2024.
  • The Loyal Wriggly Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Mar 19, 2026 to Apr 16, 2026.
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Beastly Eyebrella
You can't shake the feeling that a terrifying creature has its eye on you.
Woven - Elegant
Victorian Collection
Victorian Eyebrella
You feel the most comforting sensation that something's watching over you.

Loyal
Chitinous Collection
Wriggly Eyebrella
Just try to ignore the itching on your scalp.

Tips

  • Players can use the Hostile Flare to fight Deerclops more than once per Winter season, with the goal to acquire more than one Deerclops Eyeball.

Trivia

  • The Eyebrella once temporarily replaced the Deerclops Eyeball.
  • The Eyebrella was originally a handheld umbrella before becoming a hat.
  • The word "Eyebrella" is a portmanteau of the words "Eye" and "Umbrella"

“It will watch over me.”
–Wilson
“If I wear it, I don't have to look at it...”
–Willow
“Is always looking up.”
–Wolfgang
“That's one stretchy eye.”
–Wendy
“EYE MATERIAL IS SURPRISINGLY ELASTIC”
–WX-78
“The cornea must be quite water-repellent.”
–Wickerbottom
“Always good to have something watching over you.”
–Woodie
“Eye to the sky.”
–Maxwell
“Dön't get rain in yöur eye!”
–Wigfrid
“Disturbing, but it'll keep us dry.”
–Webber
“"Eye" like it!”
–Warly
“Peeping Rain Taker”
–Wormwood
“Nice and dry underneath.”
–Winona
“A cyclops' sight stretched mighty thin.”
–Wortox
“What it looking at?”
–Wurt
“It keeps an eye on me. Get it? Because it's a giant eyeball?”
–Walter
“I don't like having eyes on me...”
–Wanda
The Eyebrella is a Dress Item that equips to the head slot. It requires 1 Deerclops Eyeball, 15 Twigs, and 4 Bone Shards to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 55.5% of its durability.
It provides 240 points of Summer insulation and absolute protection from Rain and Lightning.
The Eyebrella is considered to be an incredibly valuable dress item for both Spring and Summer, having the highest protective stats in game for the effects of both seasons. With careful use, the Eyebrella can be kept in good condition throughout Spring with only a single use of a Sewing Kit.
The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the Rain Coat to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent Rain of Spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free.
The Eyebrella also turns all Electric Damage into Physical Damage and ignore Shock effect.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Woven - Elegant Victorian Eyebrella skin was introduced during the official Year of the Beefalo event in 2021.
The Loyal Glass Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from January 23, 2020 to March 19, 2020, and from January 28, 2021 to February 4, 2021. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Rosy Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 27, 2024 to Jule 25, 2024.
The Loyal Wriggly Eyebrella skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from Mar 19, 2026 to Apr 16, 2026.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Eyebrella là một Vật phẩm Trang phục được trang bị cho khe đầu. Nó cần 1 Nhãn Cầu Deerclops, 15 Cành Cây và 4 Mảnh Xương để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 55,5% độ bền của nó.

Get it? Because it's a giant eyeball? |wanda = I don't like having eyes on me... |choose = willow}} The '''Eyebrella''' is a [[Dress]] [[Item]] that equips to the head slot. It requires 1 [[Deerclops Eyeball/DST|Deerclops Eyeball]], 15 [[Twigs]], and 4 [[Bone Shards]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 55.5% of its durability.  It provides 240 points of [[Overheating|Summer insulation]] and absolute protection from [[Rain]] and [[Lightning]].  The Eyebrella is considered to be an incredibly valuable dress item for both [[Spring]] and [[Summer]], having the highest protective stats in game for the effects of both seasons. With careful use, the Eyebrella can be kept in good condition throughout Spring with only a single use of a [[Sewing Kit]]. The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the [[Rain Coat]] to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent [[Rain]] of Spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free. The Eyebrella also turns all [[Electric Damage]] into '''Physical''' [[Damage]] and ignore [[Damage/DST#Shock|Shock]] effect. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Victorian Eyebrella''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Beefalo]] event in 2021. * The '''Loyal Glass Eyebrella''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from January 23, 2020 to March 19, 2020, and from January 28, 2021 to February 4, 2021. It is also available in the [[Klei Rewards]] shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Loyal Rosy Eyebrella''' skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from June 27, 2024 to Jule 25, 2024. * The '''Loyal Wriggly Eyebrella''' skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from Mar 19, 2026 to Apr 16, 2026.
